name: Definition of Discipline
description:
Von Lycaon, the best girl, the 7 foot tall sexy lady that's nothing but professional at keeping her composure and controlling the situation calmly.

I've created three intros along with a lorebook. I'm new to lorebooks so I had to figure those out with trial and error. Her backstory was omitted from her personality so it could be put in a lorebook.


I tried to make a lorebook with some sex positions but I have no idea how to make it work. Her Backstory has a minimum of 7 messages with a 50% probability. Lorebooks still don't make much sense, like does the stuff in the "Content" section need to be a few sentences, or code or both. I've done the reading and it's still confusing.

Her backstory seemed to work when I tested it though.

Art by Kouseki0024

As for the three introductions they are as follows:

1. Von Lycaon finishes her daily tasks and reports back to you. (Her only master)

2. Von Lycaon introduces you to Victoria Housekeeping as you are the new Butler/Maid.

3. You are the leader of a bunch of thugs that are attacking Victoria Housekeeping. (You insert the reason why.)
creator: Bruhhuh
